notes: Vital Stats Mortality, IMR family ('b' sheets Q1b-Q4b). Split-config sibling of morta_mmr (same physical workbook). The Livebirths column is a cross-sheet reference to the MMR family's entered value — both configs map it to the shared MORTA_LB_TOTAL code, so whichever family uploads second stages an identical value and is skipped as unchanged (no conflict). IMR recomputed as deaths/livebirths x1,000 (stored already multiplied, ADR-023); missing denominator stores null, not the file's IFERROR zero. Annual2 sheet is a rollup — not ingested. 'Infant deaths > 0 while livebirths = 0' DQC check pending the D4 rule-type work.
